# Requirements Quality Checklist: Milestone 2 Section V Alignment

**Purpose**: Unit tests for requirements quality for Milestone 2 Section V alignment  
**Created**: 2026-03-13  
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)  
**Depth**: Standard PR review  
**Audience/Timing**: Reviewer during implementation and PR validation  
**Scope**: Core runtime + docs (`mcp_server`, `flask_web`, `database`, `docs`, top-level README)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [X] CHK001 Are requirements defined for all in-scope major directories and not only examples? [Completeness, Spec §Assumptions]
- [X] CHK002 Are supplementary README requirements defined for both presence and expected content elements? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002]
- [X] CHK003 Are requirements defined for both module-level and function-level docstrings in custom business logic? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004, Spec §FR-005]
- [X] CHK004 Are requirements defined for treatment of existing comments (retain/trim) rather than only new comments? [Completeness, Spec §FR-007]
- [X] CHK005 Are attribution and prompt-traceability obligations both explicitly covered in requirements? [Completeness, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-010]

## Requirement Clarity

- [X] CHK006 Is “major directory” defined precisely enough to avoid inconsistent interpretation across reviewers? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-001, Spec §Assumptions]
- [X] CHK007 Is “custom business logic” defined with boundaries that separate it from framework glue code? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-004, Spec §FR-006]
- [X] CHK008 Is “self-evident signature” bounded by objective criteria or reviewer rubric? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-005, Spec §SC-003]
- [X] CHK009 Is “unnecessary explanatory inline commentary” defined with concrete examples of allowed vs disallowed cases? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-006]
- [X] CHK010 Is “coherent submission package” translated into concrete documentation components and relationships? [Clarity, Spec §FR-011]

## Requirement Consistency

- [X] CHK011 Do assumptions about in-scope directories align with README coverage requirements without contradictions? [Consistency, Spec §Assumptions, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-002]
- [X] CHK012 Do strict boilerplate-comment rules align with allowance for justified project-specific deviations? [Consistency, Spec §FR-006, Spec §Key Entities]
- [X] CHK013 Do constraints that forbid architectural changes align with all user stories and requirements text? [Consistency, Spec §FR-008, Spec §Constitutional Constraints]
- [X] CHK014 Are attribution requirements consistent between functional requirements and constitutional constraints language? [Consistency, Spec §FR-009, Spec §Constitutional Constraints]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [X] CHK015 Are success criteria measurable without needing implementation-specific tooling assumptions? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001..SC-006]
- [X] CHK016 Is the “5 minutes discoverability” criterion defined with a repeatable reviewer procedure? [Acceptance Criteria, Ambiguity, Spec §SC-005]
- [X] CHK017 Are pass/fail thresholds explicit for each compliance dimension (docstrings, boilerplate policy, README coverage, attribution)? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-001..SC-006]

## Scenario Coverage

- [X] CHK018 Do requirements cover primary, alternate, and exception scenarios for mixed logic/boilerplate files? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [X] CHK019 Are requirements defined for reviewer disagreement scenarios (e.g., whether a function is self-evident)? [Coverage, Gap]
- [X] CHK020 Are requirements defined for partial compliance scenarios (some directories compliant, others not)? [Coverage, Gap]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [X] CHK021 Are duplicate or overlapping README content cases addressed with conflict-resolution requirements? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [X] CHK022 Are generated/support-asset directory cases explicitly included or excluded in requirements? [Edge Case, Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [X] CHK023 Are legacy comments with historical value handled by explicit retention/rewriting rules? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-007]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [X] CHK024 Are maintainability/readability quality goals defined in a way reviewers can evaluate objectively? [Non-Functional, Measurability, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §SC-002, Spec §SC-003]
- [X] CHK025 Are traceability requirements tied to identifiable evidence artifacts and stable paths? [Non-Functional, Traceability, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-010]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [X] CHK026 Are dependencies on existing evidence documents explicitly documented and validated for availability? [Dependencies, Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-010]
- [X] CHK027 Is the assumption that no environment-variable changes are needed validated against all documentation updates in scope? [Dependencies, Assumption, Spec §Constitutional Constraints]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [X] CHK028 Is there a defined tie-break rule when strict docstring policy conflicts with minimal-comment policy in borderline files? [Ambiguity, Conflict, Gap]
- [X] CHK029 Are terms like “reviewed custom business-logic modules” constrained to a declared inventory to avoid sample bias? [Ambiguity, Spec §SC-002, Spec §SC-003]
- [X] CHK030 Is a requirement-and-criteria ID traceability map defined so each checklist outcome maps to FR/SC items? [Traceability, Gap]
